ground_truth.summary: Local/native copy-paste-DND rework introduced multiple regressions (eager temp-file creation blocking copy + /tmp path leak, unfiltered text/uri-list parsing, authority-only proxy routing, hardcoded path-case-sensitivity).

human_threads.note: mjbvz: temp-file eager creation / /tmp path leak; +4 Copilot bot threads

ground_truth.caveat: reverted twice for aggregate regressions; no single named bug
